name.ja: <ruby>旅<rt>たび</rt></ruby><ruby>立<rt>だ</rt></ruby>ちの<ruby>三<rt>さん</rt></ruby><ruby>賢<rt>けん</rt></ruby><ruby>者<rt>じゃ</rt></ruby>

requirement.en: During a turn that you have not activated "The Journeying Three Magi".

effect.en: Send the top 3 cards of your Deck to the Graveyard. Then, you can add to your hand 1 Level 4 or lower LIGHT, DARK, or WATER Attribute Spellcaster Type Effect Monster from among the cards sent.
